places.title: Bhigwan Bird Sanctuary
places.description: Often called the “Bharatpur of Maharashtra,” this sanctuary on the Ujani Dam backwaters hosts thousands of migratory birds like flamingos, storks, and herons every winter.

places.title: Siddheshwar Temple
places.description: Siddheshwar Temple is a revered temple dedicated to Lord Shiva in Baramati. The temple is known for its peaceful atmosphere and beautiful traditional architecture. It becomes especially vibrant during Mahashivratri, when many devotees gather for special rituals and celebrations.

places.title: ISKCON Temple
places.description: Beautiful marble temple dedicated to Lord Krishna, known for its spiritual chants and serene environment.

places.title: Shivsrushti
places.description: Interactive museum showcasing the life and legacy of Chatrapati Shivaji Maharaj through beautiful dioramas and exhibits.

places.title: Sharad Pawar Museum
places.description: A repository of local history, achievements, and the evolution of modern Baramati through various phases of development.

places.title: Clock Tower Baramati
places.description: The Clock Tower is one of the recognizable landmarks in Baramati. Located in a busy area of the city, it represents the town’s historical charm.

hotels.title: Tathastu Veg
hotels.description: Authentic vegetarian cuisine at Club Chowk, Baramati Bhigwan Road, Inamdar Nagar.

hotels.title: Hotel City Inn
hotels.description: A comfortable and convenient hotel providing modern amenities for both tourists and business travelers.

events.title: Ganesh Festival
events.description: Witness the grand celebrations and artistic Ganpurti idols throughout the city.

events.title: Krishik Expo
events.description: One of India's largest agriculture exhibitions showcasing modern farming technologies.
